title: Create Listing
error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
metaDescription: Create a new property listing on MyHome24App and publish your property professionally.
intro: Create a new property exposé for your real estate listing. Enter the key details so your property can be presented professionally on MyHome24App.
imageHelper: Optional: Add a direct image link so the listing immediately gets a preview image.

errors.loginRequired: Please log in first to create a listing.
errors.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.createFailed: An error occurred while creating the listing.

tips.typeText: Choose the right property type and purpose so your listing appears in the correct search results.
tips.priceText: A clear and realistic price improves listing quality and makes comparison easier.
tips.imageText: An image or cover link improves presentation and makes the listing much more attractive.
tips.cityText: The city is one of the most important search criteria for interested users and should be entered correctly.
